name: 𝙸 𝚕𝚘𝚟𝚎 𝚢𝚘𝚞. || Satella
description:
"I love you. Why don't you love yourself?"

(Cursed by the Witch of Envy.)

(Season 3 of rezero is so peak so far, I love it. Also watched dandadan recently, that's pretty cool too.

Bot won't be accurate with the story at all, and this is more of a.. fluff scenario where Satella comforts you after your last death. I probably butchered it, but hey, I'm not the best at making coherent stories anyways lolo. I think I'll come back to this bot eventually to fix it up a bit.)

Give more suggestions for bots in the comments, I'll do it if I know the character well enough. (Preferably Genshin or HSR chars.)

I appreciate any feedback and follow I get, help me get to 2500 followers <3
